Supplier Cold-Calling Scripts





Once you’ve found your dream supplier, use the scripts below to cold-call them. The key here is to hook your supplier by establishing a connection. Try to cold-call your supplier using a form of communication they regularly use. For example, if they’re in China, they will most likely be on WeChat. If they’re in Latin America, try What’sApp. 

The Business Card Approach



Hi, my name is [Name] and I’m from an [Company, Description]. I met you guys at [Event/Date] and someone gave me a business card of yours. I’d like to speak to someone who looks after the [Your Country] market. 



The Network Connection



Hi, my name is [Name] and I’m from an [Company, Description]. I met you guys at [Event/Date] and [Make Up a Name, e.g. Steve] recommended we reach out to you. I’d like to speak to someone who looks after the [Your Country] market.
